description: 自由职业/独立开发者 — 非传统职业路径，项目制经历，测试 Agent 对非标经历的提炼能力
summary: Independent software consultant with 7+ years building web and mobile products for startups and agencies. Shipped 30+ projects across fintech, e-commerce, and healthtech. Looking to join a product team for more impact and collaboration.

workExperience.title: Independent Software Consultant
description: Built MVPs for 12 early-stage startups, 8 went on to raise seed funding
Developed a telehealth platform (React Native + AWS) serving 5K+ patients monthly
Maintained long-term retainer relationships with 3 agencies, delivering features on 2-week sprint cycles
Managed client relationships end-to-end: scoping, contracts, delivery, and handoff

workExperience.title: Full-Stack Developer
description: Lead developer on 15+ client projects ranging from landing pages to complex SaaS dashboards
Introduced CI/CD pipeline and automated testing, reducing client-reported bugs by 40%
Mentored 3 junior developers through pair programming and code reviews

workExperience.title: Frontend Developer
description: Sole frontend developer for a B2B procurement platform
Rebuilt legacy jQuery app in React, improving page load time by 60%
Designed and implemented responsive component library used across 3 products

education.description: Graduated top 10% of class. Final year project: E-commerce recommendation engine.

personalProjects.name: SaaS Micro-tools
description: Collection of 6 niche SaaS micro-tools (PDF editor, invoice generator, form builder)
$3K MRR combined, 2K+ total users, fully bootstrapped

awards: Product Hunt #3 Product of the Day — BudgetBuddy (2023)
